name: Glazed Ceramic Vase Green - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of nature to your decor with this Medium Reactive Glaze Vase from Threshold™. Made of ceramic with reactive glaze finish, this tall vase is designed in a green hue to add a vibrant touch to your space. You can fill this watertight vase with fresh blooms or your favorite faux flowers to create a centerpiece for any cozy nook in your home.

Flowing glazes with shifting tones and varied surface effects are the natural result of this handcrafted ceramic vase, offering each piece naturally imperfect charm — no two vases are alike, celebrating the beauty of handmade tradition.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
